mapper.insert: INSERT INTO R_USER_EMAIL_PREF_T (USER_ID, EMAIL_ENABLED, DIGEST_MINUTES, MODIFY_AT) VALUES (#{USER_ID}, #{EMAIL_ENABLED}, #{DIGEST_MINUTES}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE EMAIL_ENABLED = #{EMAIL_ENABLED}, DIGEST_MINUTES = #{DIGEST_MINUTES}, MODIFY_AT = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM R_USER_EMAIL_TYPE_PREF_T WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY ALERT_TYPE, FIELD(SEVERITY, 'CRITICAL', 'MAJOR', 'MINOR', 'WARNING')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO R_USER_EMAIL_TYPE_PREF_T (USER_ID, ALERT_TYPE, SEVERITY, DELIVERY_MODE) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{item.ALERT_TYPE}, #{item.SEVERITY}, #{item.DELIVERY_MODE})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM R_USER_EMAIL_TYPE_PREF_T WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ALERT_TYPE = #{alertType} AND SEVERITY = #{severity}
SELECT * FROM R_USER_EMAIL_DEVICE_T WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY DEVICE_ID, ALERT_TYPE, FIELD(SEVERITY, 'CRITICAL', 'MAJOR', 'MINOR', 'WARNING')
SELECT * FROM R_USER_EMAIL_DEVICE_T WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM R_USER_EMAIL_DEVICE_T WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEVICE_ID = #{deviceId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO R_USER_EMAIL_DEVICE_T (USER_ID, DEVICE_ID, ALERT_TYPE, SEVERITY, DELIVERY_MODE) VALUES
(#{item.USER_ID}, #{item.DEVICE_ID}, #{item.ALERT_TYPE}, #{item.SEVERITY}, #{item.DELIVERY_MODE})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM B_SYSTEM_EMAIL_T ORDER BY EMAIL_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO B_SYSTEM_EMAIL_T (EMAIL_ADDRESS, ENABLED, CREATE_AT) VALUES (#{EMAIL_ADDRESS}, #{ENABLED}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE B_SYSTEM_EMAIL_T SET EMAIL_ADDRESS = #{EMAIL_ADDRESS}, ENABLED = #{ENABLED} WHERE EMAIL_ID = #{EMAIL_ID}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM R_USER_EMAIL_PREF_T WHERE EMAIL_ENABLED = TRUE
